case_title: ROBERT GURMAN VS. CITY OF SAN FRANCISCO

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-04-2024 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO OCT-03-2024 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF ROBERT GURMAN IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT CITY OF SAN FRANCISCO IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CAROLYN GOLD; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE: $200 SERVED SEP-06-2024, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CITY OF SAN FRANCISCO
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,900.00 FILED BY GURMAN, ROBERT AS TO DEFENDANT CITY OF SAN FRANCISCO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-04-2024 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE (FEE FOR SERVICE:$50.00) REMARKS: THIS ADDRESS DOES NOT ACCEPT LEGAL DOCUMENTS. FILED BY PLAINTIFF GURMAN, ROBERT AS TO DEFENDANT CITY OF SAN FRANCISCO
THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE.
